raw_consumer_statement:
b'Re fraud on my Home Depot card. 

On XXXX XXXX I received warning text messages on my phone:
Free Home Depot Citi Fraud
Msg: Card XXXX. Did you attempt $XXXX  at THE HOME DEPOT on XXXXYes = 1, No= 2

I responded NO.   The response was:
Thank you for your response. To open a fraud dispute, please call us at XXXX XXXX XXXXI called this number to open a fraud dispute  and also noticed another amount on XXXX XXXX.   I did not make or authorize this transaction either.  

I keep all my credit cards locked away in my office unless I intend to use them.  I did not have this card on my person and definitely did not make either of these purchases.  I had just paid off XXXX  of my XXXX  Home Depot cards and the amount on this card should be zero.

Further:
I talked with the Home Depot location and they produced a copy of the receipt for this fraudelent charge.  The receipt shows the date and time.  I was working 30 miles away during this time - and definately did NOT make this purchase.    

I have tried several times to resolve this situation with the credit card company but I only get a form-letter type response.  It seems they do nothing to research my case and just want to conclude the case.'
